lines.base_translation: Por que a gente tá fazendo isso...?

lines.text_source: in this, but their faces are all pretty serious.

lines.text_source: for kicks. Guess they're all worried about Atuy.

lines.text_source: about it.

lines.base_translation: sem pensar.

lines.text_source: ...Suffice it to say, I highly doubt a skinny\n

lines.intent: duvida que um nobre franzino seja o tipo de Atuy

lines.text_source: guy like that could do anything to Atuy...

lines.base_translation: sujeito daquele tipo poderia fazer qualquer coisa com Atuy...

lines.text_source: Oh... beautiful... flatter me...

lines.base_translation: Ah... bela... me lisonjeia...

lines.text_source: Of... not... your... know no bounds...

lines.text_source: sweet nothings.

lines.base_translation: doçuras.

lines.text_source: Is he really that sick? He sure talks a lot\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: Haku estranha o comportamento do doente — falava muito para quem parecia mal

lines.text_source: for how he was acting before. It seems weird...\n
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: Continua a reflexão — a inconsistência parece suspeita
lines.base_translation: pra quem estava daquele jeito antes. Estranho...\n

lines.text_source: Huh?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.base_translation: Hein?

lines.text_source: Wait a minute. Is that why Kuon's...?

lines.base_translation: Espera aí. Será que é por isso que Kuon está...?

lines.base_translation: Este é meu solar. Muitíssimo obrigada por\n

lines.text_source: walking me here, Atuy.
lines.speaker: Atuy
lines.base_translation: me trazer até aqui, Atuy.

lines.text_source: It's only natural to help out if you see\n

lines.intent: Diz que é natural ajudar quem precisa
lines.base_translation: É natural ajudar quando se vê alguém em\n

lines.text_source: someone in trouble!
lines.speaker: Homem
lines.base_translation: em apuros!
lines.risk_notes: Tom enigmático; manter suspense. Não revelar identidade ou propósito verdadeiro.

lines.text_source: But not many take such ideology beyond empty\n

lines.intent: Elogia que poucos levam essa ideia além das palavras
lines.base_translation: Mas poucos levam essa ideia além das palavras\n

lines.text_source: words. Truly, you must have a kind heart indeed.
lines.speaker: Homem
lines.base_translation: palavras. Verdadeiramente, você deve ter um coração bondoso.

lines.text_source: Attendant-like man
lines.speaker: Sistema
lines.base_translation: Homem parecendo servo

lines.base_translation: Sim, acabei de chegar agora.

lines.text_source: market. I owe her my life. Please treat her\n

lines.text_source: with the utmost respect.

lines.text_source: Miss Atuy, if you don't mind, would you care\n

lines.intent: Convida Atuy a entrar no solar

lines.text_source: to stop in? I dearly wish to convey my full\n
lines.speaker: Chalafun
lines.base_translation: de recebê-la. Desejo lhe transmitir minha\n

lines.text_source: thanks.
lines.speaker: Ukon
lines.base_translation: de nada.

lines.text_source: Oh, no, I really ought to be going now.\n
lines.speaker: Atuy
lines.intent: Atuy declina educadamente, diz que precisa ir

lines.base_translation: Por favor não se importa comigo.

lines.intent: Pede que se encontrem novamente em breve

lines.text_source: I believe destiny brought us to each other.\n

lines.text_source: Fate cannot be denied.

lines.base_translation: O destino não pode ser negado.

lines.text_source: Ah...

lines.base_translation: Ah...

lines.text_source: Or am I... being a bother to you?
lines.speaker: Rulutieh

lines.base_translation: então...

lines.text_source: Mhm...

lines.text_source: Well, if you insist so much, I'll be happy\n

lines.base_translation: em obediência.

lines.base_translation: nos arredores da capital.

lines.text_source: Atuy...

lines.base_translation: Atuy...

lines.base_translation: atualmente listado como vago.

lines.text_source: expression.

lines.base_translation: natural.

lines.text_source: between that survey and now?

lines.base_translation: improvável.

lines.text_source: Which means those people over there are most\n

lines.base_translation: agora, na verdade.

lines.base_translation: em atacar de forma impensada.

lines.text_source: first.

lines.base_translation: primeiro.

lines.text_source: but Atuy is the daughter of a fancy noble family.

lines.base_translation: mas Atuy é filha de uma nobre muito importante.

lines.base_translation: descobrir POR QUE esses caras estão atrás dela.

lines.base_translation: Entendido.

lines.text_source: emerge.

lines.base_translation: emergir.

lines.base_translation: nada a fazer. É melhor a gente segui-los.

lines.text_source: Rulutieh and I tail the two until they go into\n

lines.text_source: to be visiting...

lines.base_translation: estar visitando...

lines.text_source: I'll pretend to be a customer and head in.\n

lines.text_source: Rulutieh, I want you to head back to the\n

lines.intent: Pede que Rulutieh volte ao Hakurokaku

lines.text_source: Hakurokaku.

lines.base_translation: Hakurokaku.

lines.text_source: Um, may I... not accompany you... inside,\n
lines.speaker: Rulutieh

lines.text_source: Sir Haku?

lines.base_translation: Sir Haku?

lines.text_source: I know she wants to help Atuy, but she'll stick\n

lines.text_source: out like a sore thumb in a hole-in-the-wall place\n

lines.text_source: like this...

lines.base_translation: assim...

lines.text_source: Oh... I'm sorry. I suppose that was a little\n

lines.text_source: Thank y--{W180}Oh, of course that is your true\n

lines.text_source: intention.

lines.text_source: N-Nothing... is the matter.

lines.text_source: ...Why are you turning on this street?

lines.text_source: Raising her voice, she hurriedly walks on ahead\n
lines.speaker: Narrador
lines.intent: Nekone levanta a voz e segue apressada na frente

lines.text_source: to the shortcut.

lines.base_translation: para o atalho.

lines.text_source: ...What's up with her?
lines.speaker: Haku
lines.intent: expressar perplexidade sobre o comportamento de alguém

lines.intent: Continuação: arrepio estranho, não apenas o...

lines.intent: Silêncio repentino cai sobre eles enquanto descem

lines.text_source: the field path in the eerie quiet.

lines.base_translation: o caminho de campo na quietude assustadora.

lines.text_source: you stay put and keep quiet.
